tasks.title: Sum of Even Numbers
tasks.description: Write a program that reads an integer `n` and calculates the sum of all even integers from 1 to `n` (inclusive). The buggy code fails to include the number `n` if it is even, has a logic error in checking for evenness, and initializes the sum incorrectly.

tasks.title: Factorial Finder
tasks.description: This program should calculate the factorial of a given non-negative integer `n`. The buggy code contains an infinite loop, an incorrect initialization, and a logic error that results in 0 for all outputs.

tasks.title: Countdown Timer
tasks.description: The program is intended to take an integer `n` and count down to 1, followed by the phrase "BLAST OFF!". The buggy code has a semicolon error that separates the loop body from the loop header, an incorrect increment expression, and missing spaces.
